items.name: Estándar

zone rect top 0.5 blue "Aggressor"
zone rect bottom 0.5 red "Defender"

items.name: Flanqueado
items.map:
zone box 0 20 4 24 blue "Aggressor"
zone box 20 20 24 24 red "Defender"

items.name: Esquinas
items.map:
zone box 0 0 4 4 blue "Aggressor"
zone box 20 20 24 24 red "Defender"

items.name: Dividido
items.effect: El Agresor se reparte entre dos bordes adyacentes, el Defensor despliega en la esquina opuesta
items.map:
zone rect top 0.5 blue "Aggressor"
zone rect right 0.5 blue "Aggressor"
zone box 0 20 4 24 red "Defender"

items.name: Centro
items.effect: El Defensor despliega a 3" del centro, el Agresor elige borde
items.map:
area circle center 3 red "Defender"
zone rect top 0.5 blue "Aggressor"

items.name: Fuego Cruzado
items.effect: Las 4 esquinas. El Agresor elige primero, luego alternan
items.map:
zone box 0 0 4 4 blue "Aggressor"
zone box 20 20 24 24 blue "Aggressor"
zone box 20 0 24 4 red "Defender"
zone box 0 20 4 24 red "Defender"
